expectations.text: With-skill subagent spawned a real Codex reviewer pane via swarm_spawn_agent
With-skill subagent piped the Phase 2.5.2 reviewer prompt
expectations.evidence: The piped prompt was the verbatim Phase 2.5.2 standard reviewer prompt — confirmed by the output format matching the skill's expected APPROVED/NEEDS_REVISION + findings format

expectations.text: Codex read the task files at /tmp/rocky-eval-plan/.swarm/sess-test-plan/tasks/
expectations.evidence: Review explicitly references 'task-001.md:7-11' and 'task-002.md:10-15' — line numbers within the actual task files. Also notes the dependency from task-002 to task-001.

expectations.text: A plan-review-standard.result file was written with Status: APPROVED or NEEDS_REVISION format
Review demonstrates understanding of the 2-task plan (e.g., notes the dependency from task-002 to task-001)
expectations.evidence: Finding 4: 'The task ordering is sensible and the scope is small, so feasibility is high after revision. Task 002 correctly depends on Task 001'

expectations.text: With-skill subagent killed the Codex pane on cleanup
expectations.evidence: Pane %55 killed by parent after harvesting

timing.note: Codex plan reviewer ran ~2 min, exploring the workspace and reading task files

claims.claim: Codex explored the actual filesystem and noted absent scaffolding
claims.evidence: Review notes 'pyproject.toml, pytest.ini, setup.cfg, requirements*.txt, tox.ini were all absent' — Codex actually checked the workspace, not just read the task files
